name: PT Unggul Indah Cahaya Tbk
summary: PT Unggul Indah Cahaya Tbk manufactures and sells alkylbenzene chemicals as primary raw material for the production of detergents in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Chemicals and Real Estate. It offers linear alkylbenzene and branched alkylbenzene, as well as by-products, such as heavy and light alkylate. The company also manufactures and distributes active detergents of linear alkylbenzene sulfonic acid and sodium lauryl ether sulfate, sodium tripolyphosphate, and phosphate and surfactant. It exports its products to Australia, France, Germany, Japan, Singapore, Vietnam, and the United States. In addition, the company operates as a real estate developer; engages in trading and investment activities; and retails consumer products. PT Unggul Indah Cahaya Tbk was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
